display.purpose: Page titles in the main Electron window.

headline.purpose: Primary task headings such as the Home playback command.

title.purpose: Settings, history, and voice module headings.

body.purpose: Descriptions, privacy hints, and long history text.

label.purpose: Status, metadata, form labels, and setup notes.

shadows.name: main-window-low-lift
shadows.purpose: Major Reader Window surfaces above the canvas.

shadows.name: dark-window-low-lift
shadows.purpose: Dark appearance version of the main surface lift.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Button, tab, nav, and status state changes.

motion.name: overlay-enter
motion.purpose: Playback Overlay opacity and transform transition.

motion.name: waveform-response
motion.purpose: Audio-amplitude bar scaling in the overlay.

narrative.overview:
VoiceReader should look like a compact macOS utility that happens to speak, not like a media app or an AI dashboard. The design system is restrained, dense, and operational: a user opens the Reader Window to complete setup, confirm status, choose a voice, or inspect local history, then returns to the app they were already using.

The main window uses low-chroma macOS layering: a sidebar plane, a content canvas, raised utility surfaces, and small status bands. The Playback Overlay is separate and more decisive: a black pill with amplitude-driven waveform motion that confirms playback without stealing focus.

The system explicitly rejects marketing-site composition, decorative dashboard modules, chat metaphors, gamified voice selection, loud gradients, and any treatment that implies VoiceReader analyzes or summarizes the user's text.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained color with one action accent.
Native-feeling density and compact Chinese labels.
Clear setup blockers placed near recovery actions.
Privacy boundaries expressed in product copy, not decoration.
Motion only for state feedback, especially playback activity.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Blue is for action, focus, selection, and information only. Never use it as decoration or section theming.

rules.name: The Faint-Is-Decorative Rule
rules.body: Faint text is never body copy, form labels, or recovery guidance. If a user must read it to proceed, use `muted` or `text`.

rules.name: The Overlay-Is-Separate Rule
rules.body: The black overlay palette belongs to playback confirmation only. Do not import it into regular Reader Window panels.

rules.name: The Product Sans Rule
rules.body: Use one system sans family throughout. Do not introduce display fonts, marketing serif pairings, or decorative mono labels.

rules.name: The Zero-Tracking Rule
rules.body: Chinese UI labels and mixed English product terms use `letter-spacing: 0`. Do not add uppercase tracked eyebrows.

rules.name: The One Raised Layer Rule
rules.body: A surface may use a shadow or a hairline, but repeated shadowed modules on one screen make the utility feel like a dashboard. Reserve lift for the primary task surface.

dos: Do keep the Reader Window compact, dense, and task-first.
Do keep playback ambient: the main window may show terse status, but live playback confirmation belongs in the Playback Overlay.
Do place setup blockers beside the action that resolves them.
Do preserve privacy boundaries in visible copy: local history, MiniMax transmission, and non-storage of audio should be plain.
Do use Chinese for user-facing copy while keeping stable English product terms such as Voice, Model, MiniMax, and VoiceReader.
Do respect reduced-motion preferences for the overlay waveform and all state transitions.
donts: Don't make VoiceReader look like a marketing site, an AI writing dashboard, or a media player with decorative playback chrome.
Don't use oversized hero layouts, decorative card grids, gamified voice selection, chat-app metaphors, loud gradients, or visual treatments that imply text content is being analyzed or summarized.
Don't expose Selected Text, Clipboard Text, Reading Targets, raw MiniMax responses, stack traces, or generated audio in status or diagnostic surfaces.
Don't use repeated shadowed cards when a flat band, hairline, or inline status row can carry the information.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, glassmorphism, uppercase tracked eyebrows, or numbered section scaffolding.
Don't make color the only status indicator; every ready, warning, and error state needs readable text.

components.name: Primary Action
components.description: The single strongest action on a surface, used for Play or direct setup recovery.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 44px; min-width: 96px; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--accent, #2458ef); color: var(--accent-text, #07101f); padding: 0 24px; font: 760 15px/1 ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 130ms ease, background-color 130ms ease, opacity 130ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-pressed, #1f4dd0); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #2458ef); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.48; }

components.name: Secondary Action
components.description: A compact utility action for settings and history commands.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 40px; width: fit-content; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--text, #1d1d1f); color: var(--surface, #fffefa); padding: 0 16px; font: 700 14px/1 ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 130ms ease, background-color 130ms ease, opacity 130ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #2458ef); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.45; }

components.name: Text Action
components.description: A low-weight action for secondary navigation, copy, stop, or reset commands.
components.css: .ds-btn-text { min-height: 40px; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: var(--accent, #2458ef); padding: 0 10px; font: 700 14px/1 ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 130ms ease, background-color 130ms ease, color 130ms ease, opacity 130ms ease; } .ds-btn-text:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, #2458ef) 10%, transparent); } .ds-btn-text:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-btn-text:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #2458ef); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-text:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.45; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: The default form field style for API keys, custom models, and selects.
components.html: <label class="ds-field-label">MiniMax API Key<input class="ds-input" placeholder="输入后会保存到本机 SQLite" type="password" /></label>
components.css: .ds-field-label { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: var(--muted, #696864); font: 680 13px/1.5 ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; } .ds-input { min-height: 42px; border: 0; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--surface-muted, #f5f3ee); color: var(--text, #1d1d1f); padding: 0 14px; font: inherit; outline: 1px solid var(--hairline, #26241f1a); } .ds-input:focus { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent, #2458ef), transparent 40%); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted, #696864); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: A compact readiness indicator with text plus a semantic dot.
components.css: .ds-status-chip { display: inline-flex; min-height: 44px; align-items: center; gap: 9px; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--surface-muted, #f5f3ee); color: var(--muted, #696864); padding: 0 12px; font: 13px/1.2 ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; } .ds-status-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--faint, #96938b); } .ds-status-ready .ds-status-dot { background: var(--positive, #238a52); } .ds-status-pending .ds-status-dot { background: var(--warning, #c9932b); }

components.name: Surface Panel
components.description: A major content container for command, settings, and history surfaces.
components.html:
Voice

快捷选择

账户验证后显示 Voice 列表。
components.css: .ds-surface { border-radius: 16px; background: var(--surface, #fffefa); color: var(--text, #1d1d1f); padding: 22px; box-shadow: var(--shadow, 0 6px 8px rgba(24, 22, 18, 0.08)); font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; } .ds-surface h3 { margin: 5px 0 0; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.15; } .ds-surface p { max-width: 64ch; margin: 10px 0 0; color: var(--muted, #696864); font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.65; } .ds-kicker { margin: 0; color: var(--muted, #696864); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation Item
components.description: The labeled macOS navigation item used in the fixed sidebar.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; width: 100%; min-height: 44px; align-items: center; gap: 12px; border: 0; border-radius: 12px; background: transparent; color: var(--muted, #696864); padding: 0 14px; font: 15px/1 ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 130ms ease, background-color 130ms ease, color 130ms ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover, .ds-nav-active { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55); color: var(--text, #1d1d1f); } .ds-nav-active { font-weight: 680; } .ds-nav-item:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #2458ef); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nav-mark { width: 20px; color: var(--faint, #96938b); font-size: 19px; text-align: center; }

components.name: Playback Overlay Pill
components.description: The non-activating playback confirmation surface with waveform bars.
components.css: .ds-overlay-pill { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 120px; height: 32px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); border-radius: 999px; background: var(--pill, #000); box-shadow: 0 10px 26px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32), 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); } .ds-overlay-pill::after { position: absolute; inset: 1px; pointer-events: none; border-radius: inherit; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); content: ''; } .ds-waveform { position: relative; z-index: 1; display: flex; height: 100%; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 3px; padding: 0 16px; } .ds-waveform span { width: 2.2px; height: 21px; border-radius: 999px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98) 42%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28)); transform-origin: center; animation: ds-wave 850ms ease-in-out infinite; } .ds-waveform span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 90ms; } .ds-waveform span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 180ms; } .ds-waveform span:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 270ms; } .ds-waveform span:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 360ms; } .ds-waveform span:nth-child(6) { animation-delay: 450ms; } @keyframes ds-wave { 0%, 100% { transform: scaleY(0.45); opacity: 0.62; } 50% { transform: scaleY(1); opacity: 1; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-waveform span { animation-duration: 1ms; animation-iteration-count: 1; } }
